[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "player freedom and agency"}, {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "turn-based but extremely flexible"}, {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "incredible writing and memorable companions"}, {"aspect": "learning_curve", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "steep learning curve"}, {"aspect": "pacing", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "can feel overwhelming or slow to manage"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "huge amount of content and replayability"}, {"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "choices actually matter in meaningful ways"}]},

  {"idx": 21, "aspects": [{"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the graphics and stuff are nice"}, {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the talking people are good"}, {"aspect": "level_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "sometimes you don't have a clue where to go"}]},
  {"idx": 22, "aspects": [{"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the AI threshold is honestly quite stupid"}, {"aspect": "stealth", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The way some of the stealth missions are set up is extremely annoying"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the graphics are honestly quite beautiful"}, {"aspect": "animation", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "character models are the UGLIEST things"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "If youre considdering buying the game, buy it on this mega spring sale and dont bother paying 40 bucks for it"}]},

]

[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the villians are incredibly shallow and everyone treats them like insane social commentary"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Morgana never changes, he never stops being a creep, he never stops making comments towards Ann or belittling Ryuji"}, {"aspect": "narrative_philosophy", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it's easily the most lackluster game in the entire extended series in expressing what it really wants to be"}, {"aspect": "moral_ambiguity", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it kinda just invalidates the chaos routes in other games because they offer no option to be so unambiguously righteous"}]},

    {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Instead jumping, you change the gravity; instead confront enemies, avoid them"},
    {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The colored graphics, like a Commodore 64 game, is nice and can bring a sense of nostalgia"},
    {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The soundtrack is spectacular, an agradable 8-bit sound for the ears"},
    {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "In the main game itself is not large, perhaps, as were the classic side action games"},
    {"aspect": "achievements", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "however it will spend a few more hours if you are hunting achievements"},
    {"aspect": "controls", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The controller compatibility works very well"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [

    {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "with a *REALLY* good sound-track"},
    {"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Total must buy for the indie game fan who just is looking for something a little strange and charming to fretter a few hours with"}
  ]},
